title: Send and clear text overlays on HttpGif playback
description:
Feature: Send and clear text overlays on HttpGif playback
Scenario: Overlay text commands are available for HttpGif flows
Given an uploaded HttpGif playback context
When send_text_overlay and clear_text_overlay are called
Then Draw/SendHttpText and Draw/ClearHttpText are sent with expected fields

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented and validated SendHttpText and ClearHttpText overlay flows for HttpGif context.
